list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"pbs.org\", \"PBS Video\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar FILMZIE_API_BASE = \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1\";\nvar FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE = \"https://d3qxhvuywdalwo.cloudfront.net\";\nfunction filmzieApiHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieHlsHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/vnd.apple.mpegurl, application/x-mpegURL, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieParam(name) {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(name) || \"\"); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction filmzieImageFromKey(key) {\n  key = cleanText(key || \"\");\n  if (!key) return \"\";\n  if (/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(key)) return key;\n  return FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE + \"/\" + key.replace(/^\\/+/, \"\");\n}\nfunction filmzieImage(item, wide) {\n  item = item || {};\n  var images = item.images || {};\n  var poster = images.poster || {};\n  var featured = images.featured2 || {};\n  var key = \"\";\n  if (wide) key = featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey || poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey;\n  else key = poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey || featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey;\n  return filmzieImageFromKey(key);\n}\nfunction filmzieContentUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieWebUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return \"https://filmzie.com/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieYear(value) {\n  var textValue = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var m = textValue.match(/^(\\d{4})/);\n  return m ? m[1] : \"\";\n}\nfunction filmzieMinutes(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  return Math.max(1, Math.round(seconds / 60)) + \" min\";\n}\nfunction filmzieLabel(value) {\n  return humanizeSlug(String(value || \"\").replace(/_/g, \"-\"));\n}\nfunction filmzieGenres(item) {\n  var cats = item && item.category ? item.category : [];\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && out.length < 6; i++) {\n    var value = filmzieLabel(cats[i]);\n    if (value) out.push(value);\n  }\n  if (!out.length) out.push(item && item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  return out;\n}\nfunction filmziePlayableVideo(video) {\n  if (!video || !video.id) return false;\n  var formats = video.formats || {};\n  var hls = formats.HLS_SSAI || {};\n  if (hls.approved === false) return false;\n  return true;\n}\nfunction filmzieStreamApi(videoId, chapName, contentTitle, image) {\n  var url = FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/video/stream/\" + encodeURIComponent(videoId || \"\");\n  var params = [\n    [\"zetsu_title\", chapName],\n    [\"zetsu_content\", contentTitle],\n    [\"zetsu_image\", image]\n  ];\n  var sep = \"?\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) if (params[i][1]) {\n    url += sep + encodeURIComponent(params[i][0]) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(params[i][1]);\n    sep = \"&\";\n  }\n  return url;\n}\nfunction filmzieEpisodeName(video, fallbackIndex) {\n  var path = video && video.sourcePath ? video.sourcePath : \"\";\n  var m = path.match(/season\\s*([0-9]+)\\/episodes\\/episode\\s*([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (!m) m = path.match(/s([0-9]+)e([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (m) return \"S\" + m[1] + \" E\" + m[2];\n  return \"Episode \" + fallbackIndex;\n}\nfunction filmzieChapterName(content, video, index) {\n  if (video && video.type === \"EPISODE\") return filmzieEpisodeName(video, index);\n  return content && content.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? (\"Episode \" + index) : \"Watch Movie\";\n}\nfunction filmzieData(item) {\n  var title = cleanText(item.title || \"Filmzie Title\");\n  var parts = [];\n  var year = filmzieYear(item.released);\n  var minutes = filmzieMinutes(item.duration);\n  if (year) parts.push(year);\n  parts.push(item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  if (minutes) parts.push(minutes);\n  var desc = cleanText(item.description || \"\");\n  if (!desc) desc = parts.join(\" - \");\n  return new Data(request(filmzieImage(item, false)), title, desc, \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(filmzieContentUrl(item), \"get\", filmzieApiHeaders(), null), false);\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar root = json.data || {};\nvar rows = root.data || [];\nvar data = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < rows.length && data.length < 40; i++) {\n  var item = rows[i] || {};\n  if (!item.sefName || item.comingSoon) continue;\n  uniquePush(data, seen, item.sefName, filmzieData(item));\n}\nif (!data.length) {\n  data.push(new Data(request(\"\"), \"No Filmzie results found\", \"The Filmzie API returned no playable results for this view.\", \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(\"https://filmzie.com/\"), true));\n}\nif (\"main\" === \"main\" || \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1/content?category=documentary&limit=30&comingSoonSupported=true\" !== \"\") emitPageAppend(\"main\", data, \"TV Shows\", \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1/content?category=documentary&limit=30&comingSoonSupported=true\");\nelse emitPage(\"main\", data, \"TV Shows\");\n"},"output":[{"cellDesing":"wide6","orientation":"vertical","defaultLayout":"longDoubletsFull","paging":"leading","section":{"sectionName":"","separator":false},"layout":{"insets":{"top":8,"bottom":8,"left":8,"right":8},"visibleCellsWidthS":2,"visibleCellsWidthM":2,"visibleCellsWidthL":3,"visibleCellsHeight":1,"heightForVisibleCells":540,"cellSize":{"width":300,"height":540},"ratio":{"inRelation":"width","number1":2,"number2":3},"constant":{"width":1,"height":2},"horizontalSpacing":10,"verticalSpacing":12},"data":[{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","openInWebView":false,"isChapter":false,"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}],"separator":""},{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"},{"key":"Accept","value":"application/json, text/plain, */*"},{"key":"Referer","value":"https://filmzie.com/"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://filmzie.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"pbs.org\", \"PBS Video\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar FILMZIE_API_BASE = \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1\";\nvar FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE = \"https://d3qxhvuywdalwo.cloudfront.net\";\nfunction filmzieApiHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieHlsHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/vnd.apple.mpegurl, application/x-mpegURL, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieParam(name) {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(name) || \"\"); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction filmzieImageFromKey(key) {\n  key = cleanText(key || \"\");\n  if (!key) return \"\";\n  if (/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(key)) return key;\n  return FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE + \"/\" + key.replace(/^\\/+/, \"\");\n}\nfunction filmzieImage(item, wide) {\n  item = item || {};\n  var images = item.images || {};\n  var poster = images.poster || {};\n  var featured = images.featured2 || {};\n  var key = \"\";\n  if (wide) key = featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey || poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey;\n  else key = poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey || featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey;\n  return filmzieImageFromKey(key);\n}\nfunction filmzieContentUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieWebUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return \"https://filmzie.com/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieYear(value) {\n  var textValue = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var m = textValue.match(/^(\\d{4})/);\n  return m ? m[1] : \"\";\n}\nfunction filmzieMinutes(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  return Math.max(1, Math.round(seconds / 60)) + \" min\";\n}\nfunction filmzieLabel(value) {\n  return humanizeSlug(String(value || \"\").replace(/_/g, \"-\"));\n}\nfunction filmzieGenres(item) {\n  var cats = item && item.category ? item.category : [];\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && out.length < 6; i++) {\n    var value = filmzieLabel(cats[i]);\n    if (value) out.push(value);\n  }\n  if (!out.length) out.push(item && item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  return out;\n}\nfunction filmziePlayableVideo(video) {\n  if (!video || !video.id) return false;\n  var formats = video.formats || {};\n  var hls = formats.HLS_SSAI || {};\n  if (hls.approved === false) return false;\n  return true;\n}\nfunction filmzieStreamApi(videoId, chapName, contentTitle, image) {\n  var url = FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/video/stream/\" + encodeURIComponent(videoId || \"\");\n  var params = [\n    [\"zetsu_title\", chapName],\n    [\"zetsu_content\", contentTitle],\n    [\"zetsu_image\", image]\n  ];\n  var sep = \"?\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) if (params[i][1]) {\n    url += sep + encodeURIComponent(params[i][0]) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(params[i][1]);\n    sep = \"&\";\n  }\n  return url;\n}\nfunction filmzieEpisodeName(video, fallbackIndex) {\n  var path = video && video.sourcePath ? video.sourcePath : \"\";\n  var m = path.match(/season\\s*([0-9]+)\\/episodes\\/episode\\s*([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (!m) m = path.match(/s([0-9]+)e([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (m) return \"S\" + m[1] + \" E\" + m[2];\n  return \"Episode \" + fallbackIndex;\n}\nfunction filmzieChapterName(content, video, index) {\n  if (video && video.type === \"EPISODE\") return filmzieEpisodeName(video, index);\n  return content && content.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? (\"Episode \" + index) : \"Watch Movie\";\n}\nfunction filmzieData(item) {\n  var title = cleanText(item.title || \"Filmzie Title\");\n  var parts = [];\n  var year = filmzieYear(item.released);\n  var minutes = filmzieMinutes(item.duration);\n  if (year) parts.push(year);\n  parts.push(item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  if (minutes) parts.push(minutes);\n  var desc = cleanText(item.description || \"\");\n  if (!desc) desc = parts.join(\" - \");\n  return new Data(request(filmzieImage(item, false)), title, desc, \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(filmzieContentUrl(item), \"get\", filmzieApiHeaders(), null), false);\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar root = json.data || {};\nvar rows = root.data || [];\nvar data = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < rows.length && data.length < 40; i++) {\n  var item = rows[i] || {};\n  if (!item.sefName || item.comingSoon) continue;\n  uniquePush(data, seen, item.sefName, filmzieData(item));\n}\nif (!data.length) {\n  data.push(new Data(request(\"\"), \"No Filmzie results found\", \"The Filmzie API returned no playable results for this view.\", \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(\"https://filmzie.com/\"), true));\n}\nif (\"main\" === \"main\" || \"\" !== \"\") emitPageAppend(\"main\", data, \"Documentaries\", \"\");\nelse emitPage(\"main\", data, \"Documentaries\");\n"},"output":[{"cellDesing":"wide6","orientation":"vertical","defaultLayout":"longDoubletsFull","paging":"leading","section":{"sectionName":"","separator":false},"layout":{"insets":{"top":8,"bottom":8,"left":8,"right":8},"visibleCellsWidthS":2,"visibleCellsWidthM":2,"visibleCellsWidthL":3,"visibleCellsHeight":1,"heightForVisibleCells":540,"cellSize":{"width":300,"height":540},"ratio":{"inRelation":"width","number1":2,"number2":3},"constant":{"width":1,"height":2},"horizontalSpacing":10,"verticalSpacing":12},"data":[{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","openInWebView":false,"isChapter":false,"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}],"separator":""}],"search":[{"request":{"url":"https://filmzie.com/api/v1/content?keyword=<searched>&limit=40&comingSoonSupported=true","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"},{"key":"Accept","value":"application/json, text/plain, */*"},{"key":"Referer","value":"https://filmzie.com/"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://filmzie.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"pbs.org\", \"PBS Video\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar FILMZIE_API_BASE = \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1\";\nvar FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE = \"https://d3qxhvuywdalwo.cloudfront.net\";\nfunction filmzieApiHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieHlsHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/vnd.apple.mpegurl, application/x-mpegURL, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieParam(name) {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(name) || \"\"); } catch (e) { return \"\"; }\n}\nfunction filmzieImageFromKey(key) {\n  key = cleanText(key || \"\");\n  if (!key) return \"\";\n  if (/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(key)) return key;\n  return FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE + \"/\" + key.replace(/^\\/+/, \"\");\n}\nfunction filmzieImage(item, wide) {\n  item = item || {};\n  var images = item.images || {};\n  var poster = images.poster || {};\n  var featured = images.featured2 || {};\n  var key = \"\";\n  if (wide) key = featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey || poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey;\n  else key = poster.amazonKey || poster.googleKey || featured.amazonKey || featured.googleKey;\n  return filmzieImageFromKey(key);\n}\nfunction filmzieContentUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieWebUrl(item) {\n  var slug = item && item.sefName ? item.sefName : \"\";\n  return \"https://filmzie.com/content/\" + encodeURIComponent(slug);\n}\nfunction filmzieYear(value) {\n  var textValue = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var m = textValue.match(/^(\\d{4})/);\n  return m ? m[1] : \"\";\n}\nfunction filmzieMinutes(seconds) {\n  seconds = parseInt(seconds || 0, 10);\n  if (!seconds) return \"\";\n  return Math.max(1, Math.round(seconds / 60)) + \" min\";\n}\nfunction filmzieLabel(value) {\n  return humanizeSlug(String(value || \"\").replace(/_/g, \"-\"));\n}\nfunction filmzieGenres(item) {\n  var cats = item && item.category ? item.category : [];\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < cats.length && out.length < 6; i++) {\n    var value = filmzieLabel(cats[i]);\n    if (value) out.push(value);\n  }\n  if (!out.length) out.push(item && item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  return out;\n}\nfunction filmziePlayableVideo(video) {\n  if (!video || !video.id) return false;\n  var formats = video.formats || {};\n  var hls = formats.HLS_SSAI || {};\n  if (hls.approved === false) return false;\n  return true;\n}\nfunction filmzieStreamApi(videoId, chapName, contentTitle, image) {\n  var url = FILMZIE_API_BASE + \"/video/stream/\" + encodeURIComponent(videoId || \"\");\n  var params = [\n    [\"zetsu_title\", chapName],\n    [\"zetsu_content\", contentTitle],\n    [\"zetsu_image\", image]\n  ];\n  var sep = \"?\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) if (params[i][1]) {\n    url += sep + encodeURIComponent(params[i][0]) + \"=\" + encodeURIComponent(params[i][1]);\n    sep = \"&\";\n  }\n  return url;\n}\nfunction filmzieEpisodeName(video, fallbackIndex) {\n  var path = video && video.sourcePath ? video.sourcePath : \"\";\n  var m = path.match(/season\\s*([0-9]+)\\/episodes\\/episode\\s*([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (!m) m = path.match(/s([0-9]+)e([0-9]+)/i);\n  if (m) return \"S\" + m[1] + \" E\" + m[2];\n  return \"Episode \" + fallbackIndex;\n}\nfunction filmzieChapterName(content, video, index) {\n  if (video && video.type === \"EPISODE\") return filmzieEpisodeName(video, index);\n  return content && content.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? (\"Episode \" + index) : \"Watch Movie\";\n}\nfunction filmzieData(item) {\n  var title = cleanText(item.title || \"Filmzie Title\");\n  var parts = [];\n  var year = filmzieYear(item.released);\n  var minutes = filmzieMinutes(item.duration);\n  if (year) parts.push(year);\n  parts.push(item.type === \"TV_SHOW\" ? \"TV Show\" : \"Movie\");\n  if (minutes) parts.push(minutes);\n  var desc = cleanText(item.description || \"\");\n  if (!desc) desc = parts.join(\" - \");\n  return new Data(request(filmzieImage(item, false)), title, desc, \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(filmzieContentUrl(item), \"get\", filmzieApiHeaders(), null), false);\n}\n\nvar json = parseJsonPayload();\nvar root = json.data || {};\nvar rows = root.data || [];\nvar data = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < rows.length && data.length < 40; i++) {\n  var item = rows[i] || {};\n  if (!item.sefName || item.comingSoon) continue;\n  uniquePush(data, seen, item.sefName, filmzieData(item));\n}\nif (!data.length) {\n  data.push(new Data(request(\"\"), \"No Filmzie results found\", \"The Filmzie API returned no playable results for this view.\", \"Filmzie\", \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(\"https://filmzie.com/\"), true));\n}\nif (\"search\" === \"main\" || \"\" !== \"\") emitPageAppend(\"search\", data, \"Filmzie Search\", \"\");\nelse emitPage(\"search\", data, \"Filmzie Search\");\n"},"output":[{"cellDesing":"wide6","orientation":"vertical","defaultLayout":"longDoubletsFull","paging":"leading","section":{"sectionName":"","separator":false},"layout":{"insets":{"top":8,"bottom":8,"left":8,"right":8},"visibleCellsWidthS":2,"visibleCellsWidthM":2,"visibleCellsWidthL":3,"visibleCellsHeight":1,"heightForVisibleCells":540,"cellSize":{"width":300,"height":540},"ratio":{"inRelation":"width","number1":2,"number2":3},"constant":{"width":1,"height":2},"horizontalSpacing":10,"verticalSpacing":12},"data":[{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","openInWebView":false,"isChapter":false,"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}],"separator":""}],"info":[{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"},{"key":"Accept","value":"application/json, text/plain, */*"},{"key":"Referer","value":"https://filmzie.com/"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://filmzie.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"distro.tv\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"jsrdn.com\", \"DistroTV\"],\n    [\"shout-tv.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"imggaming.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"dicelaboratory.com\", \"Shout TV\"],\n    [\"xumo.com\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"xumo.\", \"Xumo Play\"],\n    [\"iptv-org.github.io\", \"IPTV-org\"],\n    [\"filmzie.com\", \"Filmzie\"],\n    [\"tubitv.com\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"tubi.io\", \"Tubi\"],\n    [\"pbs.org\", \"PBS Video\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\nfunction isVerificationPage() {\n  var title = cleanText(document.title || \"\");\n  var body = cleanText(document.body ? (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\") : \"\");\n  return /just a moment|security verification|protect against malicious bots|cloudflare|ray id:/i.test(title + \"\\n\" + body);\n}\nfunction verificationDescription(site) {\n  return site + \" returned a browser/security verification page instead of readable content. Open the source in a browser, clear the check if it appears, then retry the module.\";\n}\nfunction emitVerificationPage(kind, site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var data = [new Data(request(\"\"), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page\", false, request(link), true)];\n  emitPage(kind, data, site);\n}\nfunction emitVerificationInfo(site) {\n  var link = absUrl(currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL, KETSU_BASE_URL);\n  var chapter = new Chapter(\"Source blocked by browser verification\", request(link), true);\n  emitInfo(new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(link), site + \" blocked by browser verification\", verificationDescription(site), [\"Source verification\"], \"Blocked\", site, \"Text\", \"Open source page or retry later\", [chapter]), \"\");\n}\nfunction emitVerificationChapter(site) {\n  emitTextChapter(verificationDescription(site));\n}\n\nvar FILMZIE_API_BASE = \"https://filmzie.com/api/v1\";\nvar FILMZIE_IMAGE_BASE = \"https://d3qxhvuywdalwo.cloudfront.net\";\nfunction filmzieApiHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieHlsHeaders() {\n  return [\n    new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/vnd.apple.mpegurl, application/x-mpegURL, */*\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Referer\", \"https://filmzie.com/\")\n  ];\n}\nfunction filmzieParam(name) {\n  try { return cleanText(new URL(currentUrl()).searchParams.get(name) || \"\");
